Colorful interlocking balance beams designed to improve kids’ balance, coordination,

Made with anti-slip textured surfaces for safe indoor play. Lightweight, durable, and easy to arrange in different
paths for active learning and fun. Perfect for homes, schools, and play areas.
Children identify each textured piece by touch and match it to the
correct spot on the corresponding plate. This activity encourages tactile
recognition, enhances problem-solving skills, and strengthens hand-eye
coordination. When their eyes are covered, children rely solely on touch,
helping them better understand shapes and surfaces. This training greatly
improves tactile sensitivity and recognition abilities.
A fun sensory play set featuring whale-shaped tactile stones that children identify by touch
and match to the correct plates. Helps develop tactile recognition, problem-solving skills,
and hand-eye coordination through playful, ocean-themed learning.
